creator: pgollucci@p6m7g8.com
text:
o update to 1.3.2
  o Removed files:
      files/patch-apr-util_build_dbm.m4 was removed, no comparison available
      files/patch-apr-util_configure was removed, no comparison available
    This patch is part of apr 1.3.0+
  o moved SHLIB_MAJOR into Makefile to follow other ports and reduce pkg-plist changes
  
  o via Tools/scripts/bump_version.pl
    ports requiring devel/apr and devel/apr-svn have PORTVERSION bumped to chase this
    (88 ports)
  o replace apr-1.2 with apr-1 since apr-1.2 is nolonger valid, and apr-1 will work until devel/apr2

  o Request a cluster run first ?
  o UPDATING entry ?
